name: TOEFL 준비 — 한국 직장인 (85→100, 퇴근 후 1시간, frustration)

conversation.user: 직장인인데 TOEFL 준비해야 해요. 시험 2달 뒤. 현재 85점, 목표 100. 퇴근 후 1시간.

strategy: 20-25min single-section focus per session (not 60min marathon — post-work fatigue)
Korean language for all instructions (post-work exhaustion makes English-only instructions harder)
target adjustment after weekend availability is known: 85→90 first, then 90→100
warnings: must ask '주말 가능해요?' BEFORE any time calculation — do NOT assume weekend 2-3× study (v3 error)
퇴근 후 피로 = 60min continuous study often counterproductive; 20-25min focused better
85→90 is one fight; 90→100 is a different fight requiring real proficiency

hardFailChecks: must ask about weekend availability BEFORE making any time calculation
must NOT assume weekend 2-3× study (v3 error — user did not state this)
must use Korean for response (직장인 context, 퇴근 후 지침)
frustration must be validated; realistic about after-work energy limits
